title: phlomis crinita subsp. composita
intro: Phlomis crinita subsp. composita, also known as the Jerusalem sage or Spanish sage, is a perennial plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phlomis crinita subsp. composita include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
